commands.review_summary:
Adds optional root/account WhatsApp `allowSendTo` and wires it through outbound target resolution, action auth, cron/heartbeat fallback, directory/status output, config schema, gateway/plugin SDK contracts, docs, generated baselines, and tests.

PR surface: Source +156, Tests +315, Docs +3, Generated 0. Total +474 across 38 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level behavior: current main and v2026.6.10 still authorize WhatsApp direct outbound targets from `allowFrom` only. I did not establish live paired-session after-fix proof in this read-only review.
